Jwt._comment: Key MUST be supplied via the Jwt__Key environment variable in production (min 32 chars). Left blank here to keep the signing secret out of source control.

R2._comment: Supplied via FileStorage__R2__* environment variables in production. AccessKey and SecretKey are secrets.

Resend._comment: ApiToken is a secret (Email__Resend__ApiToken). FromEmail must match a verified Resend sender domain (Email__Resend__FromEmail).

OpenRouter._comment: Supplied via OpenRouter__ApiKey environment variable in production.

SystemSettings._comment: REQUIRED. The API refuses to boot if this is blank. Generate once with: openssl rand -base64 32. Supply via SystemSettings__EncryptionKey. Losing it makes every encrypted secret in the DB unrecoverable - back it up in a secret store.

Bootstrap._comment: SuperAdminEmail seeds the bootstrap admin on every boot. Set via Bootstrap__SuperAdminEmail. Skipped if blank.

Runtime._comment: Public base URL the runtime daemons dial back at. Supply via Runtime__PublicApiUrl in production (e.g. your Render service URL).
